summary: Image capturing using device camera or gallery (ImageCaptureModule)
userSteps: Ensure NSCameraUsageDescription and NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription are set appropriately in Info.plist for production use.

ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Used to capture images for the application.</string>
	<key>NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Used to select images from your device for the application.</string>
